title: Extensible CDS view — key user field extensibility
description: Extensible CDS view — key user field extensibility. Key topics: @Extensible: true allows customers to add custom fields to. @Extensible: true is set on the BASE CDS view (interface view). Customer fields are added via APPEND structures on the DDIC.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆@Extensible: true allows customers to add custom fields to
◆@Extensible: true is set on the BASE CDS view (interface view)
◆Customer fields are added via APPEND structures on the DDIC
◆The CDS view automatically picks up appended fields at runtime
◆Prerequisites for extensibility:
◆Key user extensibility is ONLY available for #BASIC view types
◆NOT for #COMPOSITE, #CONSUMPTION, or #PRIVATE views

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆@Extensible: true allows customers to add custom fields to
◆@Extensible: true is set on the BASE CDS view (interface view)
◆Customer fields are added via APPEND structures on the DDIC
◆The CDS view automatically picks up appended fields at runtime
◆Prerequisites for extensibility:
◆Key user extensibility is ONLY available for #BASIC view types
◆NOT for #COMPOSITE, #CONSUMPTION, or #PRIVATE views

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_EXT'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Extensible view (@Extensible: true)'
@VDM.viewType: #BASIC
@Analytics.dataCategory: #DIMENSION
@Extensible: true
define view ZPRAC_CDS_EXTENSIBILITY
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
  key client            as Client,
  key travel_id         as TravelId,
      agency_id         as AgencyId,
      customer_id       as CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date        as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date          as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee       as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price       as TotalPrice,
      currency_code     as CurrencyCode,
      description       as Description,
      status            as Status
}
details:
an existing CDS view via the Key User Extensibility framework

structure (the SQL view name), NOT directly on the CDS view

✓ @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName must exist as a SE11 structure

✓ The structure must be extensible (delivery class E)

✓ @Extensible: true on the CDS view

EXTENSIBILITY FLOW:

Customer defines APPEND on ZPRAC_SQL_EXT (SE11)

→ The append fields are automatically available in the CDS view

→ Fiori / OData automatically exposes them

CUSTOMER APPEND EXAMPLE:

TYPES: BEGIN OF ZPRAC_SQL_EXT.

INCLUDE TYPE: ZAPPEND_TRAVEL_EXT. " Customer fields

TYPES: END OF ZPRAC_SQL_EXT.
